title: PokéAPI Resource Identity, URL Construction, Pagination, and Fair Use · Language Lens: Pokedex Go Resource Identity
summary: The client concatenates user input into arbitrary URLs, treats list and detail resources alike, ignores pagination links, and sends repeated requests despite the API fair-use cache request. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go resource identity increment in fixed-origin PokéAPI resource and fair-use policy. Learners progress thro…
objectives: Distinguish resource type, numeric ID, canonical lowercase name, list query, and response self URL without unsafe equivalence.
Keep scheme and authority fixed to the approved PokéAPI origin and map commands only to enumerated resource paths.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
